issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path.

scenarios.name: Build docs RAG pipeline from a website
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses crawlUrl with limit and scrapeOptions formats=['markdown'], then chunks markdown for vector DB ingestion as documented; baseline writes a custom Puppeteer crawler with HTML parsing that doesn't match the Firecrawl-specific pattern.

scenarios.name: Extract typed product data from a product page
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls scrapeUrl with formats=['extract'] and an extract.schema (Zod) returning a typed object as the skill documents; baseline scrapes raw HTML and parses with regex/cheerio, missing the LLM-powered structured extract feature.
